title: Epic of Gilgamesh, Tablet 9: The Search for Immortality
source: Standard Babylonian version; Nineveh library tablets
description: Tablet 9 of the Epic of Gilgamesh: Grief-stricken, Gilgamesh sets out to find Utnapishtim, the only mortal granted eternal life.
introduction: Tablet 9 of the Epic of Gilgamesh: Grief-stricken, Gilgamesh sets out to find Utnapishtim, the only mortal granted eternal life.

translation.text: Gilgamesh wept over the death of Enkidu. He roamed the wilderness: 'Shall I not die like Enkidu? Sorrow has entered my heart. I am afraid of death.'
